- [![](https://static.files.bbci.co.uk/bbcdotcom/web/20260629-131846-8a2eb2c100-web-3.12.0-2/grey-placeholder.png)![An Arctic ground squirrel curls up in hibernation amid fluffy bedding material (Credit: Sarah Rice)](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480x270/p0nwnl96.jpg.webp) The super-cooled squirrel that comes back to life No other mammal can survive colder body temperatures than the Arctic ground squirrel. Its chilly hibernation is inspiring new treatments for heart attacks, stroke, and brain injury.](https://www.bbc.com/future/article/20260703-the-arctic-ground-squirrel-could-revolutionise-emergency-care)

- [![](https://static.files.bbci.co.uk/bbcdotcom/web/20260629-131846-8a2eb2c100-web-3.12.0-2/grey-placeholder.png)![A woman surveys the vast view from a mountaintop (Credit: Rob Shearer)](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480x270/p0nw83nb.jpg.webp) My trip to the view that inspired 'America the Beautiful'In 1893, a teacher scaled Pikes Peak in Colorado and penned one of the US's most cherished songs, "America the Beautiful". Today, travellers can retrace her historic ascent.](https://www.bbc.com/travel/article/20260701-the-view-that-inspired-america-the-beautiful)

## America 250

- [![](https://static.files.bbci.co.uk/bbcdotcom/web/20260629-131846-8a2eb2c100-web-3.12.0-2/grey-placeholder.png)![Crop of The Bloody Massacre perpetrated in King Street, Boston on March 5,1770 by a party of the 29th Regiment (Credit: The Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York/ Gift of Mrs Russell Sage)](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480x270/p0nvq2r5.jpg.webp) The bloody 1770 Boston Massacre image that fueled the American Revolution How a gory depiction of the 1770 Boston Massacre by Paul Revere ignited fury against British rule, becoming arguably the most effective example of propaganda in US history.](https://www.bbc.com/culture/article/20260629-the-bloody-1770-image-that-fuelled-the-american-revolution)

- [![](https://static.files.bbci.co.uk/bbcdotcom/web/20260629-131846-8a2eb2c100-web-3.12.0-2/grey-placeholder.png)![An illustration depicting William Shakespeare whispering into the ear of the Statue of Liberty (Credit: Emmanuel Lafont)](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480x270/p0nvxpkq.jpg.webp) A language split in two: How America reinvented English](https://www.bbc.com/future/article/20260630-how-america-reinvented-english)

- [![](https://static.files.bbci.co.uk/bbcdotcom/web/20260629-131846-8a2eb2c100-web-3.12.0-2/grey-placeholder.png)![A commemorative New Sweden Joint Issue stamp depicting a map of the area and a colonial man meeting with Native Americans (Credit: BBC/ Serenity Strull/ Getty Images)](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480x270/p0nvtng9.jpg.webp) How a secret Swedish colony played a pivotal role in the US's founding](https://www.bbc.com/travel/article/20260629-new-sweden-the-uss-long-lost-secret-colony)
